ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "security_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "listing_exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "etf" TEXT /* Whether the company is an ETF or not */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the company's headquarters */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry in which the company operates */,
  "full_time_employees" INTEGER /* Number of full-time employees */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company's headquarters is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the company's headquarters is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company's headquarters is located */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date when the company went public */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company's business */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's official website URL */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Company's contact phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Company's headquarters address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "exchange_type" TEXT /* Type of exchange (e.g., stock, options, futures) */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock performance record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company to which the record belongs */,
  "day_high" REAL /* Day high price of the stock */,
  "enterprise_to_revenue" REAL /* Enterprise to revenue ratio of the company */,
  "forward_eps" REAL /* Forward EPS of the company */,
  "book_value" REAL /* Book value of the company */,
  "shares_short" REAL /* Number of shares short */,
  "short_ratio" REAL /* Short ratio of the company */,
  "float_shares" REAL /* Number of float shares */,
  "enterprise_value" REAL /* Enterprise value of the company */,
  "regular_market_price" REAL /* Regular market price of the stock */,
  "latest_dividend" REAL /* Latest dividend paid by the company */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the company */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the company */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the company */,
  "52_week_high" REAL /* 52-week high price of the stock */,
  "52_week_low" REAL /* 52-week low price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_performance_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company to which the statement belongs */,
  "statement_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial statement */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the company */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the company */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the company */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the financial statement */,
  "fiscal_quarter" INTEGER /* Fiscal quarter of the financial statement */,
  "revenue_growth" REAL /* Revenue growth rate of the company */,
  "net_income_growth" REAL /* Net income growth rate of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_data" (
  "trading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company to which the record belongs */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* High price of the stock */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Low price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the trade */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "moving_average_50" REAL /* 50-day moving average of the stock price */,
  "moving_average_200" REAL /* 200-day moving average of the stock price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who manages the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_companies" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio to which the company belongs */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the company in the portfolio */,
  "allocation" REAL /* Allocation percentage of the company in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used by the user */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating system used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was sent */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., stock price alert, portfolio value alert) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggered the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
